story: Suffering Builds Character started as a joke in a Discord voice channel after a particularly brutal ranked loss streak — someone said the phrase, everyone groaned, and the name stuck. What began as four friends refusing to duo-queue with strangers grew into a multi-game roster that treats every scrim, every clutch, and every rage-quit as character development. We don't recruit the most mechanically gifted players. We recruit the ones who keep queuing up anyway.
rules: Show up. If you can't make a scrim, say so before it starts, not after.
Comms are for the team, not your ego.
New members get coached, not benched.
